name: python3-cvss
title: python3-cvss
summary: CVSS2/3/4 library with interactive calculator for Python
description:
CVSS2/3/4 library with interactive calculator for Python
This Python package contains CVSS v2, v3 and v4 computation utilities and
interactive calculator (for v2 and v3 only) compatible with Python 3.
CVSS (Common Vulnerability Scoring System) is an standardized method for
rating the severity of security issues on a scale from 0 (no impact) to
10 (critical).

commands.name: cvss_calculator
commands.description: calculate Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) metrics

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cvss_calculator because CVSS2/3/4 library with interactive calculator for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cvss_calculator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cvss_calculator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cvss_calculator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
